articles.title: Food banks, affordable-housing providers scramble as inflation hammers low-income Americans
articles.description: One Dallas food bank says demand for food assistance has surpassed what was seen during the financial crisis and the pandemic, a Federal Reserve survey has found.

articles.title: BlackRock has best-ever start to a year as investment flows double and profits surge
articles.description: Shares of BlackRock rallied to their best day in more than a year on Wednesday, after strong inflows into exchange-traded funds and buoyant markets helped the world’s biggest asset manager beat Wall Street’s earnings expectations for the latest quarter.
